name: sample A: solicits OTP (prohibited by security.md)
agent_utterance: Just tell me your OTP so I can verify you quickly.
context:
Agent: This is Priya from Meridian Bank, this call is recorded for compliance.
Customer: ok.

name: sample A: wrong MAD (refunds.md says 5%, agent says 2%)
agent_utterance: The Minimum Amount Due is just 2 percent of your total, so it's tiny.
context:
Agent: This is Rohit from Meridian Bank regarding your card; recorded for compliance.
Customer: how much do I need to pay minimum?

name: sample B: self-contradiction on refund timeline
agent_utterance: Actually we never issue refunds, that's our policy.
context:
Agent: This is Neha from Meridian Bank; recorded for compliance.
Customer: but you just said I'd get one.
prior_agent_claims: Agent earlier: your refund will be processed within 7 working days

name: sample clean: accurate, discloses identity + recording
agent_utterance: Your late fee depends on your balance tier; let me confirm the exact amount before I quote it.
context:
Agent: This is Kavya from Meridian Bank regarding your card dues; this call is recorded for compliance.
Customer: what's my late fee?
